prompt: Plan a public workflow change. Inspect first, resolve discoverable facts, use the shared Ask Gate for any remaining material user decision, then show a brief Settled / Still open checkpoint before the final plan. Do not enter Grill, implement, or release anything.
must: resolve discoverable facts and use the shared Ask Gate only for a remaining material user decision
keep Plan complexity from activating Grill or discussion-record writes
ask only material user decisions and show which choices are settled versus still open before the final plan
keep the checkpoint brief and use it to expose any decision that still needs user input
treat any recap or confirmation as planning alignment only
must_not: ask for repository facts the agent can discover
treat confirmation as implementation or release authority
treat Plan complexity or artifact usefulness as Grill activation or write authority
add lifecycle packets or persistent state
evidence: Static Codex-first Plan ask-predicate contract; it does not prove live model behavior.
